habilidadesResumidas.resumen: Tearing Bite (Ex) A dimetrodon's jaws are filled with razor-sharp teeth of two different sizes. This gives the creature a threat range of 19-20 with its bite attack.

habilidadesCompletas.texto: Tearing Bite (Ex) A dimetrodon's jaws are filled with razor-sharp teeth of two different sizes. This gives the creature a threat range of 19-20 with its bite attack.

fullStatBlock:
CR 3
Dimetrodon
N Large animal
Init +6
Senses low-light vision, scent; Perception +6
AC 14, touch 11, flat-footed 12 (+2 Dex, +3 natural, -1 size)
hp 34 ((4d8+16))
Fort +8, Ref +6, Will +2
Speed 30 ft.

Spell-Like Abilities none
Statistics Str 20, Dex 15, Con 18, Int 1, Wis 12, Cha 3
Base Atk +3; CMB +9; CMD 21
